dict.string: The FKPermissions example demonstrates how to request camera authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates “Always” location authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates temporary full-accuracy location.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates When-In-Use location authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates microphone authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates read access to the photo library.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates add-only photo library authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates notification authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates Bluetooth authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates calendar access on older iOS versions.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates full calendar access on iOS 17 and later.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates reminders access on older iOS versions.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates full reminders access on iOS 17 and later.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates media library authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates speech recognition authorization.
The FKPermissions example demonstrates App Tracking Transparency.
